summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Abrdn International Small Cap Active ETF (ASCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund fund aims for long-term capital growth by actively managing a portfolio of small capitalization companies outside the US. ASCI was launched on Sep 30, 1996 and is issued by aberdeen.

holdings.infoBox: ASCI is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI India Small Cap ETF stock at 6.53%, Japan Elevator Service Holdings at 4.39%, Diploma at 4.39%, ASICS at 4.05%, and Ssc Government Mm Gvmxx at 3.76%.
